policy.purpose: Translate the creator's coaching language into stable scoring dimensions without copying a private or unverified total-score formula.
policy.missing_evidence_policy: Missing evidence does not become a technical deduction.
policy.root_cause_policy: Result indicators such as flat arc, slow release, or unstable ball path must route back to upstream dimensions before recommending drills.
policy.manual_first_policy: Guide-hand and vision mappings remain manual/review-first until hand tracking, ball-hand contact, or dominant-eye inputs are available.

mappings.creator_language: 手等脚、脚带手、手慢一点
aliases: 感受到脚下力量后再起球
mappings.maps_to_problem: 上肢抢节奏、起球过早、手快脚慢
mappings.why_this_mapping_is_valid: 这个角度讨论的是起球和下肢启动之间的先后关系。上肢先把球架起时，下肢无法顺势把球送上去，后续容易变成手臂补力，所以应映射到时序同步。
inference_path: creator observes whether the hand moves before the feet
early hand lift separates ball rise from lower-body push
separated timing creates upper-body compensation
system evaluates timing_sync through ball-lift and lower-body timing evidence
mappings.confidence_policy: Current automatic candidate when side-view timing signal is available; degrade to review on low fps or missing ball/lower-body reference.
false_positive_checks: 接球投篮、急停和后撤步会改变起球节奏，不能套用定点节奏强判。
低帧率或球被遮挡时，起球时间可能误差过大。

mappings.creator_language: 上肢先动、起球早、球先架起来
mappings.maps_to_problem: 起球早导致上下肢脱节，并进一步影响发力链完整性
mappings.why_this_mapping_is_valid: 起球早本身是时序问题，但它会让下肢发力和球的上升脱开，导致发力链后段只能靠上肢补偿。因此主映射到 timing_sync，次级影响 power_chain_integrity。
inference_path: creator labels the motion as upper body moving first
early ball lift removes the ball from the lower-body push window
force transfer becomes segmented instead of continuous
system should mark timing first and use it as evidence for power-chain review
mappings.confidence_policy: Treat as timing candidate first. Promote power-chain concern only when another downstream signal such as low release or trunk lean supports the same chain break.
false_positive_checks: 个别高水平球员可能有稳定的早起球风格，必须结合出手质量和重复性。
只看到出手后半段时不能判断起球是否真的早。

mappings.creator_language: 动力链打通、力量连续传递
aliases: 脚踝-膝-髋-躯干-肩肘腕连续
mappings.maps_to_problem: 发力链断裂、上肢代偿、力量卡在膝/腰/肩/手
mappings.why_this_mapping_is_valid: 发力链完整性是博主评分系统的最高优先级，但它不是单一视觉点。它需要由时序、下肢、躯干、上肢和释放质量共同支持，属于上层组合维度。
inference_path: creator scores whether lower body, trunk, and upper body form one continuous chain
no single metric can prove the whole chain
multiple lower-level dimensions expose chain breaks from different parts
system aggregates supporting signals into power_chain_integrity as the top-level concern
mappings.confidence_policy: Composite dimension. Current v1 should return candidate/review based on multiple supporting dimensions, not a high-confidence complete power-chain diagnosis.
false_positive_checks: 单个指标异常不能证明整条发力链断裂。
伤病、疲劳、距离变化和个人风格会改变链条表现。

mappings.creator_language: 力量压到膝盖、脚下不快、慢出现在膝盖
mappings.maps_to_problem: 下肢效率不足、空蹲、脚踝/髋膝没有把力量快速向上转化
mappings.why_this_mapping_is_valid: 这个角度不是单纯批评屈膝，而是在判断下肢屈曲是否转化成向上速度。力量停在膝盖会拖慢起跳和起球，所以映射到下肢效率，并作为发力链问题的上游证据。
inference_path: creator identifies slow or knee-heavy lower-body loading
knee-heavy loading suggests force is not quickly converted through ankle/hip extension
inefficient lower-body output weakens the whole chain
system evaluates lower_body_efficiency with flexion pattern and shot-distance context
mappings.confidence_policy: Do not flag deep knee flexion alone. Require timing, distance, or release-quality context before making it a lower-body efficiency problem.
false_positive_checks: 三分球可能需要更深下肢蓄力。
当前系统脚踝速度仍是 planned signal，不能伪装成已完全识别。

mappings.creator_language: 身体前趴、前冲、重心没有回正
mappings.maps_to_problem: 重心与躯干不稳定，释放空间被压缩，出手点偏低
mappings.why_this_mapping_is_valid: 前趴会让身体向前而不是向上送球，容易压低释放高度并改变出手角度，因此主映射到重心与躯干稳定，结果层影响出手质量。
inference_path: creator observes forward body drift or trunk lean
forward drift reduces vertical release space
lower release can flatten or rush the shot
system links trunk_center_stability to release_quality when low release is also present
mappings.confidence_policy: Candidate when side-view trunk lean combines with low release or forward drift. Trunk lean alone remains review.
false_positive_checks: 急停、对抗或后撤步投篮可能自然产生前倾。
单视角 2D 可能把身体旋转误投影成前倾。

mappings.creator_language: 肩肘腕同向、顶肘压腕自然、手型不摇
mappings.maps_to_problem: 上肢力线不顺、肘腕晚期补偿、球路方向被手腕或前臂带偏
mappings.why_this_mapping_is_valid: 这个角度评价的是肩肘腕和球的释放方向是否一致。力线不顺会导致晚期靠手腕补偿，进而影响释放稳定性，所以映射到上肢力线与释放链。
inference_path: creator observes elbow/wrist direction and release smoothness
misaligned upper-body chain creates late correction or lateral force
late correction reduces repeatable release quality
system links upper_body_release_line to release_quality when release evidence is present
mappings.confidence_policy: Side view can support height and flexion; front view is required for stronger lateral line diagnosis.
false_positive_checks: 只有侧面时不能强判左右力线。
稳定个人出手路径不一定完全垂直。

mappings.creator_language: 辅助手托球但不压球、不推球、不横向干扰
mappings.maps_to_problem: 辅助手主动发力或撤离时机不对，造成球路横向偏移
mappings.why_this_mapping_is_valid: 辅助手问题直接影响球离手瞬间的方向控制。但当前自动识别缺少可靠手部关键点和球手接触，所以映射有效，自动判定必须保持人工/复核优先。
inference_path: creator observes off-hand behavior at release
off-hand pressure adds lateral force to the ball
lateral force can change ball path without changing lower-body mechanics
system stores this as guide_hand_control but marks it review-only until hand tracking exists
mappings.confidence_policy: Review-only in v1 unless a human annotation or future hand-tracking signal confirms the issue.
false_positive_checks: 球路偏左/偏右不能单独反推辅助手。
手或球被遮挡时只能要求补拍。

mappings.creator_language: 主视眼、头、手和起球路径匹配
mappings.maps_to_problem: 视觉瞄准结构和起球路径冲突，导致身体或上肢横向代偿
mappings.why_this_mapping_is_valid: 主视眼和起球路径会影响球员如何把球放到瞄准线附近。冲突时球员可能用头、肩或手臂旋转补偿，所以映射到视觉结构；但普通视频无法稳定自动识别主视眼，必须人工/问答优先。
inference_path: creator links dominant-eye context to ball-lift path and body direction
visual conflict can create lateral compensation
lateral compensation affects release line and ball path
system keeps the angle as vision_alignment with manual input required
mappings.confidence_policy: Manual/review-first in v1. Automatic report should ask for dominant-eye input or front-view retake.
false_positive_checks: 主视眼不是错误本身，只是解释起球路径的上下文。
不能把个人稳定瞄准习惯强行改成模板。

mappings.creator_language: 出手快、弧度高、球路稳定
mappings.maps_to_problem: 释放质量受影响；根因需要回查时序、下肢、躯干和上肢
mappings.why_this_mapping_is_valid: 快、高、稳是博主用来观察优化结果的释放表现。它能说明出手质量，但不是根因本身，所以映射到 release_quality，并要求回查上游维度。
inference_path: creator uses release speed, arc, and stability as outcome evidence
outcome evidence indicates whether the chain produced a usable release
poor outcome alone cannot identify root cause
system routes release_quality back to upstream dimensions before recommending repairs
mappings.confidence_policy: Treat as result indicator. Never recommend a root-cause drill from release quality alone unless upstream dimensions support it.
false_positive_checks: 当前球轨迹仍是启发式，不代表稳定命中判断。
远距离投篮自然会改变释放角、高度和速度。

mappings.creator_language: 实战抗干扰、强度下复现
mappings.maps_to_problem: 实战迁移能力暂不进入 v1 评分
mappings.why_this_mapping_is_valid: 这是博主评分体系里的重要结果维度，但用户已明确当前先不做实战分。它应作为后续动态投篮/趋势模块边界保留，不进入当前自动评分。
inference_path: creator uses game-pressure transfer as an outcome target
v1 scope intentionally excludes practice-game score
system records the angle as deferred to avoid false product claims
mappings.confidence_policy: Excluded from v1 scoring. May inform future trend or dynamic-shot module only after separate evidence contract exists.
false_positive_checks: 训练环境视频不能直接证明实战迁移。
没有防守强度、脚步、接球/运球上下文时不得下实战结论。
